name: San Miguel Brewery Hong Kong Limited
summary: San Miguel Brewery Hong Kong Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes bottled, canned, and draught beers under the San Miguel Pale Pilsen brand in Hong Kong, Mainland China, the Philippines, and internationally. It also sells beers under the San Miguel Pale Pilsen, San Mig Light, Dragon Beer, Red Horse, Guang's Pineapple Beer, etc. The company was founded in 1948 and is based in Shatin, Hong Kong. San Miguel Brewery Hong Kong Limited is a subsidiary of Neptunia Corporation Limited.
